title: The Route to Big Mom’s Territory
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Pekoms, Unknown person #2, Pudding, Unknown person #3, Carrot as The rescue team reaches Big Mom’s territory and learns how Sanji is trapped by family and political pressure.
scene: The Sanji retrieval team enters Big Mom’s sphere of influence, where every friendly face may be connected to the wedding trap.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hm, hm, hm, so that's how it is!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My apologies, I just assumed that you were an enemy()

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...so in other words, that ship over there is one that you hijacked from an enemy...()

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahhhhh!! Could it be, you have something very sweet stocked up in there?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But of course.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mama will be so delighted once she finds out :)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a bit of a surprise for her from me... so I'd appreciate it if you didn't file a report regarding the arrival of the ship.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, that's so heartwarming! HuehuehueHueHueHueHue (I hear you loud and clear!!! :)

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: Sir Pekoms, You're Sooo Suaave :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Look, chopper!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So many different kinds of people walking around!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WOAA AAAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The bricks... the houses ...literally everything here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Not to mention,

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Is made of Chocolate !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A chocolate town!!! I've died and gone to Heaven!!')

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: A chocolate fountain!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do you call that for short, a "Choco- Tain"?!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: A chocolate hot springs ?!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Chocolate clothes?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Now this... this is cute!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Nami, you look gorgeous~ :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: “We have a new New York Times

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It takes about a day from here to get to whole cake island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I went easy on you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How is it? Do I still look like a pirate?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey, broo-...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Heh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Go out and buy us some groceries before we get moving again.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Roger that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey Pekoms, I've noticed that there seem to be all kinds of races gathered here at this place!!

dialogue.speaker: Carrot
dialogue.text: There's even minks! It's like a wonderland.

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: That's precisely what Mama dreams of!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A Utopia where all races from around the world can live in harmony without discrimination, prejudice, or segregation...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And by that, I mean literally all the races of the world!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's easier if you simply consider this place as one large, powerful nation at this point.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are 34 islands dotted around whole cake island,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and each of these islands are ruled by "Chancellors".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We refer to all of these islands in general as such:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: "Totland" !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This particular island happens to be the one "Chancellor Chocolate" rules over.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As you can see, the entire town is made out of chocolate.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Its full name is "Chocolate" of cacao Island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Sounds delicious ...()

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Approach storyline with 45 dialogue beats. The crew moves from Zou toward Big Mom’s territory and begins to understand the scale of Sanji’s predicament.
